sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41430" key="e)pitriptiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπι-τριπτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπιτρίβω</foreign> III) <sense id="n41430.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">irritating, exciting,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λόγοι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:6:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.6.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
